case_title: LUANNE MARSEE VS. JEREMY'S RETAIL, INC. et al

docket_entries.description: SUMMONS ON COMPLAINT ALSO SERVED ADR PACKAGE; CIVIL CASE COVER SHEET, PROOF OF SERVICE ONLY, FILED BY PLAINTIFF MARSEE, LUANNE SERVED DEC-06-2010, SUBSTITUTE SERVICE ON NATURAL PERSON AS TO DEFENDANT JEREMY'S RETAIL, INC.

NO APPEARANCE, NOR OBJECTION FILED. CASE DISMISSED AS TO ENTIRE ACTION BY COURT AT ORDER TO SHOW CAUSE HEARING JUL-11-2011 AT 1:30PM. THE COURT FINDS NO GOOD CAUSE OR SUBSTANTIAL JUSTIFICATION FOR FAILURE TO COMPLY WITH THE PREVIOUS COURT ORDERS. A LESS SEVERE SANCTION WOULD NOT BE EFFECTIVE DUE TO THE HISTORY OF LACK OF COMPLIANCE. NOTICE SENT BY COURT.

calendar.matters:
ORDER TO SHOW CAUSE
Off Calendar Jul-11-2011 Dismissal
MINI MINUTES: No appearance. The court having reviewed the file finds no good cause or substantial justification for plaintiff's failure to comply with the court's orders and rules. Therefore, it is hereby ordered that this matter be dismissed. The court finds that a less severe sanction would not be effective due to the history of lack of compliance. Proceedings not reported. (610)

ORDER TO SHOW CAUSE
Off Calendar Apr-11-2011 Continued To Jul-11-11 At 01:30 P.M. In Dept 610

CASE MANAGEMENT CONFERENCE
Off Calendar Feb-22-2011 Set For Order To Show Cause On Apr-11-11 At 01:30 P.M. In Dept 610

PROOF OF SERVICE ORDER TO SHOW CAUSE
Off Calendar Jan-18-2011 Sanctions
MINI MINUTES: No appearance. Plaintiff is sanctioned $200.00, for failure to appear. The OSC is ordered off calendar. Proceedings not reported. (610)
